description: Migrate from single-database publishing to per-module databases so all 18 WASM modules can be hydrated. Includes fixing stale binary detection, hydration status reporting, and gitignore for ADRs.

phases.name: Quick fixes — binary priority, hydration status, gitignore
phases.description: Three small fixes that are independent of the per-module migration and unblock developer ergonomics immediately.

tasks.name: Fix find_nexus_binary() priority order
tasks.description: Check target/debug and target/release BEFORE PATH lookup so stale-binary detection works during development. Current order: env var → PATH → local builds. New order: env var → local builds → PATH.

tasks.name: Fix HydrationResult::status() for single-tier
tasks.description: status() returns 'hydrated' when all active tier modules publish successfully. Currently checks schema_verified which may fail even when all tiers succeed. Also update the CLI output to not show dormant tiers as failures.

tasks.name: Un-gitignore docs/adrs/
tasks.description: Remove or amend the docs gitignore pattern so ADRs can be git-added without -f. Check .gitignore for the pattern and fix it.

tasks.name: Kill stuck spacetimedb-update processes
tasks.description: ensure_spacetimedb() should detect and kill hung spacetimedb-update processes that block spacetime version calls. Add a timeout-based cleanup before attempting spacetime start.

phases.name: Database name constants in hex-core
phases.description: Define canonical database names for all 18 modules as constants in hex-core so all crates share the same names. Each module's database name matches its directory name.

tasks.name: Add SPACETIMEDB_MODULE_DATABASES constant map
tasks.description: Add a const array or module mapping each WASM module name to its database name in hex-core/src/lib.rs. Database name = directory name for all modules except hexflo-coordination which stays as 'hex' for backward compat.

phases.name: Per-module publish in spacetime_launcher
phases.description: Update publish_module() and publish_modules_ordered() to use per-module database names. Restore MODULE_TIERS with all 18 modules.

tasks.name: Update publish_module() to accept database name per module
tasks.description: Change the free function publish_module(host, database, module_path) to derive the database name from the module directory name. hexflo-coordination → 'hex', all others → directory name. Update SpacetimeLauncher::publish_modules() similarly.

tasks.name: Restore MODULE_TIERS with all 18 modules
tasks.description: Re-enable all 4 tiers in MODULE_TIERS. Each module publishes to its own database so schema conflicts are impossible. Keep hexflo-coordination in tier 0.

phases.name: Update nexus adapters to use constants
phases.description: Replace hardcoded database name defaults in nexus adapters with hex-core constants. Env var overrides remain.

tasks.name: Update spacetime_inference adapter default database
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded 'inference-gateway' default with hex_core constant.

tasks.name: Update spacetime_chat adapter default database
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded 'chat-relay' default with hex_core constant.

tasks.name: Update spacetime_secrets adapter default database
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded 'hex-nexus' default with hex_core constant for secret-grant module.

tasks.name: Update spacetime_session adapter default database
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded 'chat-relay' default with hex_core constant for session persistence.

phases.name: Full hydration test and validation
phases.description: End-to-end test: hydrate all 18 modules, verify each database exists with correct tables, run parity check on all subsystems.

gate.command: hex stdb hydrate && hex nexus status && hex swarm status && hex task list && hex inbox list

tasks.name: Full hydration — all 18 modules published
tasks.description: Run hex stdb hydrate and verify all 4 tiers report success. Check hex stdb status shows all 18 modules with checkmarks.

tasks.name: Parity validation — all subsystems green
tasks.description: Verify: project list, swarm status, task list, inbox, inference endpoints, session persistence all work against their respective databases.
